overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a masked character walking through a nighttime urban protest encampment in London. The scene features anti-Albion protest signage, private military checkpoints, and modern glass architecture illuminated by streetlights and neon building lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and concrete planters

events.description: moving from open plaza onto sidewalk along city street

agents.ego_description: walking through urban plaza toward the street, passing benches and planters

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter with trimmed shrubbery
wooden and metal park bench on the plaza
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows in the background
tall street lighting pole casting white light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza at night, passing concrete planters and benches. Modern glass buildings rise in the background as the character approaches a street with traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with dedicated bus lane and traffic

events.description: black taxi and white car drive past on the street
approaching the protest encampment area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to red bus lane, passing illuminated digital billboard

notable_agents.action: black taxi driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing a bridge image
circular bus stop sign on a black pole
tall glass building with distinctive blue wave lighting pattern
black metal railing separating sidewalk from bus lane

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk next to a red bus lane, passing a large digital billboard on the left. Modern glass skyscrapers dominate the skyline, including one with distinctive blue lighting. Vehicles including a black taxi drive past on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: protest encampment entrance with overhead banners

events.description: walking under large red 'END ALBION RULE' protest banner into the encampment
ground becomes littered with debris and protest materials

agents.ego_description: walking under protest banner into the encampment, approaching security barriers

notable_agents.action: Albion security guard in red uniform standing behind metal barriers

entered.detail: large red protest banner with yellow text reading 'END ALBION RULE'
white canopy tents set up for the protest encampment
black metal crowd control barriers with Albion branding
various handwritten protest signs attached to metal fencing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a protest encampment by walking under a large red 'END ALBION RULE' banner. White tents and metal crowd barriers line the path, with an Albion security guard visible behind the barriers. The ground is littered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: protest camp interior with security checkpoint

events.description: Albion guard raises weapon and takes defensive stance
character stops briefly to observe the security checkpoint

agents.ego_description: navigating through the protest camp, observing signs and guards, briefly stopping to assess the situation

notable_agents.action: Albion guard in red uniform patrolling behind barriers with weapon raised

entered.detail: illuminated blue sign reading 'ILLEGAL ACTS WILL BE PROSECUTED'
red banner with yellow text asking 'REMEMBER DEMOCRACY?'
white banner with red text reading 'HAVE A HEART YOUR BOSS FARTS!'

segments.scene_description: Inside the protest camp, the character moves past various protest banners including 'REMEMBER DEMOCRACY?' and 'HAVE A HEART YOUR BOSS FARTS!'. An Albion guard stands alert behind barriers near a sign warning that illegal acts will be prosecuted. The character pauses briefly to observe the security presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: protest camp exit with road barriers

events.description: exiting the enclosed protest area past road closed barriers
passing construction barriers and digital information kiosk

agents.ego_description: walking past road closed signs and orange barriers, exiting the protest encampment

notable_agents.action: civilian standing near the exit barriers

entered.detail: bright orange plastic construction barriers lining the path
red sign with white text reading 'ROAD CLOSED'
illuminated digital display showing a map and advertisements
white banner with red text reading 'PRIVATE MILITARY CUNTS'

segments.scene_description: The character exits the protest encampment by walking past orange road closed barriers and construction signage. A digital advertising kiosk stands on the right while protest banners including 'PRIVATE MILITARY CUNTS' are visible on the left. The scene opens up as the character leaves the enclosed camp area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, modern urban plaza into the cluttered heart of a political protest encampment before emerging back into the city streets. It begins by tracking the character through an open plaza of concrete planters and glass buildings, moving toward a busy sidewalk where a black taxi drives past a glowing blue skyscraper and a large digital billboard. As the character continues, the scene shifts from the open road into a confined protest zone, passing under a large red banner that reads END ALBION RULE and moving through a corridor of white tents and metal barriers. The camera then pushes deeper into the camp, gliding past debris and various satirical banners while pausing briefly to observe an alert Albion security guard. Finally, the environment opens up again as the character exits the encampment, passing orange road closed barriers and digital kiosks to return to the wider city landscape.
